channel.title: Face-Recognition on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Face-Recognition on Arrans github.io

item.title: boltgolt/howdy
item.description: 🛡️ Windows Hello™ style facial authentication for Linux

item.title: IliasHad/edit-mind
item.description: Local-first AI video intelligence platform. Index your video library with multi-modal analysis (YOLO, DeepFace, Whisper), search semantically via natural language, Docker-ready.
